title: The Tech Startup Crisis
description: You are the CEO of a newly funded tech startup. Your lead engineer just quit right before a major product launch, and a competitor has announced a similar feature. Can you navigate the crisis?
question: Your lead engineer just quit two weeks before launch. What do you do?

choiceA.text: Delay the launch and hire a new lead engineer.

choiceB.text: Push the current team to finish the launch on time without the lead.

title: The Data Breach
description: You are the CTO of a mid-size e-commerce company. Your security team has just discovered a potential data breach affecting customer payment information.
question: A data breach may have exposed customer payment data. What is your first action?

choiceA.text: Immediately notify all affected customers and go public with the breach.

choiceB.text: Quietly investigate and patch the vulnerability before making any announcement.

title: The Team Conflict
description: You are a project manager. Two of your senior developers are in a serious conflict that is affecting the whole team's productivity and morale.
question: Two senior developers are clashing and the team is suffering. How do you handle it?

choiceA.text: Hold a mediated meeting with both developers to address the conflict directly.

choiceB.text: Separate them by moving one developer to a different project to avoid confrontation.
